name: loki-office

scripts.dev:
pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs && echo '→ loki-office backend (watch src/) on :3456
→ loki-office-dev vite HMR on :5173
→ pm2 logs to follow'
scripts.dev:stop: pm2 delete loki-office loki-office-dev 2>/dev/null; echo '→ dev stopped'
scripts.deploy: bun install && bun run build:office && pm2 delete loki-office-dev 2>/dev/null; pm2 restart loki-office

description: Loki Office — Multi-Agent Workflow UI for Loki-Oracle. tmux orchestra control. CLI + Web UI.
